events.title: CM Suvendu Adhikari Sworn In
events.description: Suvendu Adhikari takes oath as the Chief Minister of West Bengal at Brigade Parade Ground, Kolkata. PM Modi, NDA leaders, and over 2 lakh supporters attend the historic ceremony.

events.title: Council of Ministers Takes Oath
events.description: Full 42-member council of ministers sworn in, including key portfolios: Home, Finance, Health, Education, and Industry.

events.title: CM Visits Nabanna Secretariat
events.description: CM Adhikari arrives at Nabanna (State Secretariat) for the first time. Reviews pending files and administrative backlog.

events.title: Meeting with Chief Secretary & DGP
events.description: High-priority meeting with the Chief Secretary and DGP to assess law & order situation and pending administrative matters.

events.title: First Cabinet Meeting at Nabanna
events.description: CM Adhikari chairs the historic first Cabinet meeting. Multiple landmark decisions taken on Day 1 itself.

events.title: BSF Border Fencing — Land Transfer Approved
events.description: Cabinet approves transfer of land to BSF for construction of fencing along the Bangladesh border. 45-day target set for completion.

events.title: Ayushman Bharat Adopted in West Bengal
events.description: State formally adopts the Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY health insurance scheme, previously blocked by the TMC government for over 5 years.

events.title: PM Vishwakarma & Ujjwala 3.0 Greenlit
events.description: Cabinet approves immediate implementation of PM Vishwakarma Yojana for artisans and PM Shri Ujjwala Yojana 3.0 for free LPG connections.

events.title: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita Implemented
events.description: BNS, BNSS, and BSA criminal law codes officially implemented statewide, replacing the holdover IPC/CrPC regime.

events.title: Job Age Limit Extended by 5 Years
events.description: Upper age limit for state government job applicants extended by 5 years — providing relief to lakhs of aspirants affected by SSC delays.

events.title: State Census Exercise Initiated
events.description: Cabinet approves immediate commencement of the Census exercise in West Bengal, pending since 2021.

events.title: Writers' Buildings Restoration Announced
events.description: Government announces plan to shift the state secretariat back to the historic Writers' Buildings in central Kolkata.

events.title: Existing Welfare Schemes to Continue
events.description: CM Adhikari assures that no existing social welfare schemes will be discontinued. All beneficiaries will continue to receive benefits.
